leadText: Tickle (Japanese: くすぐる Tickle) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Tickle reduces the target's Attack and Defense stats by one stage each. In Generation III only, Tickle is not blocked by substitute . If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Tickle, the user's Defense stat rises by one stage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Makes the foe laugh to lower Attack and Defense . FR LG The foe is made to laugh, reducing its Attack and Defense stats. Colo XD Makes the target laugh to lower Attack and Defense . D P Pt HG SS PBR The user tickles the foe into laughing, reducing its Attack and Defense stats. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user tickles the target into laughing, reducing its Attack and Defense stats. S V The user tickles the target into laughing, lowering its Attack and Defense stats.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Reduces the target's Attack and Defense by one level. MD T D S Reduces the target's Attack and Defense by 1 level. B S L てきポケモンの こうげき ぼうぎょを １だんかいさげる MD GtI S MD It lowers the enemy's Attack and Defense. MD RT DX It tickles an enemy, making them giggle and lowering their Attack and Defense.
